responsibilities: Design site grading, drainage, and utility layouts using Civil 3D to support residential and commercial land development projects
Prepare construction drawings, specifications, and engineering calculations to ensure compliance with local building codes
Conduct hydrology and hydraulic analyses to design stormwater management systems that meet regulatory requirements
Coordinate with surveyors, architects, and contractors to resolve site design conflicts and ensure constructability
Prepare and submit permit applications to municipal and state agencies to secure project approvals
Perform site visits and construction administration to verify field conditions align with approved design documents
Develop cost estimates and quantity take-offs to support project budgeting and bid preparation
Review and incorporate geotechnical and environmental study findings into civil design deliverables
